title: convolvulus microphyllus var. macra
intro: Convolvulus microphyllus var. macra is a variant of the Convolvulus microphyllus plant, also known as a small-leaved bindweed or small-flowered convolvulus, a flowering plant in the morning glory family. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Convolvulus microphyllus var. macra include its use as a diuretic, to treat fever, and to relieve rheumatic pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
